original_image_tags: A typed form on aged, slightly yellowed paper with two punch holes at the top. The form contains 25 numbered fields with handwritten-style typed answers. The text "Incident No. 177" is typed in the top right. The bottom of the page has a vertical line on the right margin and the word "(over)" centered at the bottom.

elements.description: A typed form titled 'INCIDENT SUMMARY SHEET' with Incident No. 177. The form contains numbered fields with typed responses, including observation details for a sighting in Kentwood, La. on 5 Sept 48. The text indicates the object was not visually seen but heard, with notes like 'terrific' speed and 'Unusual sound'. No embedded photographs, sketches, or diagrams are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains a typed form with 'Incident No. 177' and no embedded photographs or diagrams, but Description B adds specific content details (e.g., 'INCIDENT SUMMARY SHEET' title, Kentwood, La. sighting) that Description A omits without contradiction.
